name: Trump Headquarters
subject: you HAVE to see this poll:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
100% to the people. 100% from the people. 100% official. |

| | | | | | | **[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7965d315b944410f1dc658783bde4efaff102e6fe3453b30f2c4b2ad538b76b46784c077fe0b5dcbca55012fb0f98c5df4d32bd889f16483)**

Friend,

We're the OFFICIAL polling team of President Trump, and to get REAL approval numbers in the media we're showing the strength of our grassroots movement and calling on top supporters.

**We noticed your 2018 response is pending, Friend.**
**How would you rate President Trump 's job performance? ** [GREAT](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7965d315b944410f5ff6a2fc240ecc0570b12d1fe7f68e18f8aba14696a54c7357b93c56210264ed76da6dcec62e0a043e263cc96f123ff7) [GOOD](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7965d315b944410f526b2acd210495f517596dbe0ed5ecb1fd1142ed0e9343a1c2a0f917847de83de4f8210380c14c77a14ca446f3302638) [OKAY](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7965d315b944410f2b0aa3d7a1fdcad4bbb86a2d42389b7ca001a0434eeb20f4db31685c56277b31457d720b19d63266c91441c86e5416d0) [OTHER](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7965d315b944410f001e5a111aaef1da3413273bdf245acd71087557d1ca2118463de0fe330a9c44eecadaf3bfeab5236c25e8ba4427e30d)
**[Please, take a moment to take the Official Presidential Approval Poll today and let President Trump know your thoughts.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7965d315b944410f3908304a9240ff9c5001281c8117fa55a26ed776667d1cd81393d196838965e010f57cdd8611962a04e6b7d757a029dd)**

Thank you,

Trump Headquarters
Official Polling Team

[TAKE THE POLL](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7965d315b944410f001e5a111aaef1da3413273bdf245acd71087557d1ca2118463de0fe330a9c44eecadaf3bfeab5236c25e8ba4427e30d)

name: Laura
subject: all-out GOP blitz in Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
**The GOP's in the middle of an all-out blitz here in Nevada** , friends:
| | | | National Republicans and a Mitch McConnell-linked Super PAC **POURED **money into ads against Democrat Jacky Rosen. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | Donald Trump recently **FUNDRAISED** for Heller in NV. |
---|---|---|---
| | | | A recent poll shows that we've **LOST OUR LEAD** and are now trailing Dean Heller by one point! |
---|---|---|---
The GOP is doing whatever it takes to win this race so the party can keep its grasp on Senate control for another two years.

**If the election were held today, we could lose the race that Nate Silver says Democrats NEED to win if we want to take back the Senate and be a check on Donald Trump.**

So we're counting on you to help us turn it around. We can't win in Nevada and take back the Senate for Democrats unless you give right now**. **[Give $5 ASAP to help us fight back against Donald Trump's candidate, flip Nevada blue and take back the Senate this November:](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6b9/4fbb2af3/7d55c107/5e8b2aea/319197292/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgxOC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk818-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")****

**Rosen for Nevada

Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6b9/4fbb2af3/7d55c107/5e8b2af6/319197292/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6b9/4fbb2af3/7d55c107/5e8b2af7/319197292/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6b9/4fbb2af3/7d55c107/5e8b2af4/319197292/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). We greatly appreciate your continued support.

Contributions to Rosen for Nevada are not tax deductible.

name: Trump Headquarters
subject: Ordering?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
Newt is still signing copies. Don’t miss yours. |
---
| | | | | | | |

Friend,

Newt Gingrich is spending every free second he has signing copies of his latest book, "Trump's America."

_He 's ready to sign one for you. But your name isn't on the latest order list._

**[All Newt asks is that you make a contribution of $50 to the President's efforts to elect true conservative champions of our agenda this November.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0791e2ff70080e8743097756eaad8a38a2cd933adb6e38bd9dd6c3f72e358d17d7cc0ce4215ea9b9bfaa6cabb8f87431187a0aa3b5ca2f24)**

Thanks,

Trump Headquarters [ORDER YOURS](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0791e2ff70080e87c88437638e361bd0dc8002a5e2796aeb7212593f2ad06dcd7dcb962d8035eb126b16da6e363603a7906cc1b359852813)

**\--------- Forwarded Message ---------**
**From:** Newt Gingrich
**Subject:** I'd love to mail you one
**To:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0791e2ff70080e87ff2b6203a2bdc1cae67d584589e8cd2ced28aec25095ef9160a6773ecf49a282bcb6c140bfbfd57d8da160e4f3a30714)**

---
**[Authorized By Trump Headquarters](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=7aeb0b9f5da7be42887cd3c7582d53b887a2db3fb4d4755f99fcce899ac4065e014ccea26fd0b652344f74ddf87d76837c87a9b213b2a25e)**

Friend,

The mainstream media doesn't want to report on America's great comeback...

...So you and I will get the news out ourselves. That's why I wrote a book called "**Trump 's America**" detailing the revolutionary work President Donald J. Trump has done to Make America Great Again!

---
| I'm**personally** signing copies of my book -- and I'd love to mail you one. **[All I ask is that you make a contribution of $50 to the President's efforts to elect true conservative champions of our agenda this November.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0791e2ff70080e8792e4acc1bc7f4aa9f56e2f5ad0bfdbab4fe7eee6f0eea91efc025fe8954e0922f99131b3cb1c1d092c87d030915e983c)** [](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0791e2ff70080e873c66e794369e9bc55752c294708c4800eeff0558398f79205410c66f5a7df5211f1061b8fee524504769be7985edf268)Friend, you've been such a loyal and committed supporter. I want you to know that I'm fighting alongside you every step of the way.

Our hard work is paying off. We are winning the fight.

**[Please make a contribution of $50, and I would be honored to sign a copy of my book for you.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0791e2ff70080e87c974a0a8d9e6e54e353ac2347995dcc688666b21a9e997883da1216223c21d2d13e38ad317559257804fa96fa6348a28)**
Your Friend,

[](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0791e2ff70080e871a243bb44b32da5fdb47f952fcb9144219f14a4b5376434c8a28794d14f003ef32f762d19c72d607dd4f512670f19ade)
Newt Gingrich
[ORDER YOURS](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=0791e2ff70080e87c532c25186a3e39397cf6d51a7b6cfe039d607d317034fdefc284185d1cfbb1c9713651cf6267a8ec9b359f80ffccb47)

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: We are making progress
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
body:
|
---

| | | This email has a lot of information about what I've been working on, but I hope you will take a moment to read it.

**_[I need your support for my re-election campaign, and I want to make sure you understand why and how I'm working to earn it.](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline?amount=27&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=1+-+I+need+your+support+for+my+reelection+ca&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1")_**

* * *

Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the political catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos.

In May, the Senate passed a resolution to save net neutrality. I can't overstate how big a victory this is for Democrats. Many said our bill wouldn't go anywhere, but it did. We showed the Senate can still come together and address the issues that matter to millions of Americans, consumers, and small businesses.

We are also making progress on my bill to protect Native American items and artifacts. The Safeguard Tribal Objects of Patrimony (STOP) Act passed unanimously out of its first Senate committee. I introduced this bill after meeting with local students who are pushing for greater protections for tribal artifacts, and I'm proud we've cleared the first hurdle to passing this bill.

And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am looking to protect them. I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area - a sacred places to all New Mexicans - from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history.

Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives. I came to the Senate to represent New Mexicans and our values, and we are making progress that will help people across our state and country.

**_[That is why I am asking for your support today. I am in my first Senate re-election race this year, and all this hard work and more will be undone if one of my extreme right-wing opponents defeats me this November. To make sure that doesn't happen, we need to reach our weekend fundraising goal by bringing in $5,000 in grassroots donations. Will you pitch in and help me reach this goal before the midnight deadline?](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline?amount=27&recurring=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=2+-+That+is+why+I+am+asking+for+your+support&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1")_**

_If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_
**[Donate $10 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=10amp;firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=3+-+Donate+ask+now&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1")** **[Donate $27 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=27&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=4+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1")** ****[Donate $50 now](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline?express_lane=true&amount=50&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=5+-+Donate+ask+now+&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1")**** **[Donate another amount](http://nm.martinheinrich. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mth-sunday-deadline?amount=27&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=87103&city=Albuquerque&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=heinrich&utm_content=6+-+Donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1&source=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1&refcode=MH_EM_FR_90DO_180708_1_1")** Thank you for sticking with me and supporting me.

Martin

---

| PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE
---

clean_body: | | | | This email has a lot of information about what I've been working on, but I hope you will take a moment to read it. "" Nearly every day, we face news about President Trump's scandals, his lies, and the political catastrophes created by his administration. But that shouldn't detract from the progress that is being made despite his chaos. In May, the Senate passed a resolution to save net neutrality. I can't overstate how big a victory this is for Democrats. Many said our bill wouldn't go anywhere, but it did. We showed the Senate can still come together and address the issues that matter to millions of Americans, consumers, and small businesses. We are also making progress on my bill to protect Native American items and artifacts. The Safeguard Tribal Objects of Patrimony (STOP) Act passed unanimously out of its first Senate committee. I introduced this bill after meeting with local students who are pushing for greater protections for tribal artifacts, and I'm proud we've cleared the first hurdle to passing this bill. And while the Trump administration makes moves to shrink our public lands, I am looking to protect them. I introduced legislation to shield the Chaco Canyon area - a sacred places to all New Mexicans - from drilling. Protecting Chaco from further development will ensure we don't lose its priceless history. Some of these updates don't warrant a breaking news alert on your phone, but they are making a difference in people's lives. I came to the Senate to represent New Mexicans and our values, and we are making progress that will help people across our state and country. "" If you 've saved your payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately: "" "" "" "" Thank you for sticking with me and supporting me. Martin | PAID FOR BY MARTIN HEINRICH FOR SENATE Help us spread the word by forwarding this email to 3 friends! Receive this email from a friend? ""** We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a key part of our grassroots team. If you would like to unsubscribe from these emails click "". Martin Heinrich for Senate PO Box 25763 Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | The "shadiest Super PAC move ever" came from a pro-Renacci Super PAC right here Peter. | | _"Ohio First PAC finally reported**nearly half a million dollars in expenditures on behalf of Rep. Jim Renacci 's Senate campaign** on Friday. But it continued to keep key elements of its operation cloaked in secrecy.

"The filings it submitted to the FEC **do not reveal the identities of the group 's donors**, just the money it spent."_ _\-- Daily Beast_ , 6/29/2018

name: ZephyrForNY.com
subject: reaching out to a few supporters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
Hey Peter, I'm Cristina, Zephyr Teachout's press secretary. I wanted to reach out to a few of our supporters, including you, about our big fundraising goal.
In just four days, we will close the books on our first campaign finance deadline, and after that, we're going to publicly report not just how much we've raised but, more importantly, how many people are powering our campaign.
Zephyr set a big goal for our team. We're trying to generate 10,000 individual donations before the deadline.
Can you make your first online donation today? Any amount would go a long way in helping us get there. Here's the link:
**[https://go.zephyrforny.com/deadline](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eb2/6e822e2f/1bea3a50/41727818/4137097656/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MDgtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180708-2-full")**
Look, we know that our opponents are relying on billionaires and corporations to fund their campaigns. But this is a people-powered campaign. That's how we're going to win -- but only if you're with us.
Thanks for all you do!
\- Cristina Gonzalez
**[DONATE](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eb2/6e822e2f/1bea3a50/41727818/4137097656/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA3MDgtMi1mdWxsIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-deadline?refcode=em180708-2-full")**

* * *
Paid for by Zephyr for NY
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eb2/6e822e2f/1bea3a50/41727819/4137097656/VEsF/ "http://zephyr.bsd.net/page/unsubscribe/") if you'd like to unsubscribe. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email. To support Zephyr with a contribution, click [here](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780eb2/6e822e2f/1bea3a50/4172781a/4137097656/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-for-ny?refcode=em_footer").

name: ACTION-ALERT@bobcasey.com
subject: tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc
body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6121/51dbcc2a/1b8acf6e/3a7052e/2463958695/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Tomorrow's the day, team, the day we find out the next nominee for the United States Supreme Court.

This administration is going to do everything in its power to confirm someone who will act in the interests of big corporations, not someone with the best interests of Pennsylvanians in mind. President Trump is picking a nominee from a list compiled by extremely conservative interest groups that do not represent the values we hold as Americans.

[**_Send a message today -- donate $5 or more to re-elect Bob Casey and protect our firewall against the Trump administration's dangerous nominees._**](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180708_fr1_v2s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

Tomorrow is a big deal. The Supreme Court makes decisions that affect the lives of ordinary Americans each and every day. If we take back the Senate in 2018, we have a chance to send people to the Supreme Court who will seek justice for all Americans and will move this country forward, not backwards.

**The impact of this decision will last for generations. Take the first step towards winning back the Senate in 2018 -- donate $5 or more to protect Bob Casey and keep Pennsylvania blue.** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[Donate $5 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180708_fr1_v2s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=5")** **[Donate $25 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180708_fr1_v2s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=25")** **[Donate $50 now](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180708_fr1_v2s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&amount=50")** **[Or click here to donate another amount](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180708_fr1_v2s1&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")** Thanks.

| Paid for by Bob Casey for Senate Inc.
---
PO Box 58746, Philadelphia, Pennsylvania 19102

Contributions or gifts to Bob Casey for Senate are not tax deductible.

Bob Casey for Senate appreciates any feedback you might have. [Click here](mailto:info@bobcasey.com?Subject=Feedback) to contact Bob Casey for Senate with any questions, concerns, or ideas. You can like Bob Casey for Senate on [Facebook](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6121/51dbcc2a/1b8acf6e/3a70535/2463958695/VEsP/ "https://www.facebook.com/BobCaseyJr/") or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6121/51dbcc2a/1b8acf6e/3a70536/2463958695/VEsHBQ/ "https://twitter.com/Bob_Casey") or [Instagram](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6121/51dbcc2a/1b8acf6e/3a70537/2463958695/VEsHBA/ "https://www.instagram.com/bobcaseyjr/"). name: IN Senate HQ
subject: Do you trust Rep. Braun?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Rep. Braun has shown Hoosiers who he really is. Now we want to hear from you. |
---

| | Peter --

The rich Republican donors funding Rep. Braun have a clear agenda. **They want to go back to the days when Hoosiers with pre-existing conditions like depression, diabetes, or cancer couldn 't get health insurance.** All so that they can put more money back in their pockets.

These GOP heavyweights want to make enormous cuts to Medicare and Social Security to pay for the tax cuts they gave themselves and their friends.

And they want to replace Indiana's Democratic senator with a far-right yes man who will blindly sign off on the most extreme parts of the Trump-McConnell-Koch agenda.

**Republican Rep. Braun and his special interest allies are looking out for themselves. That 's why Rep. Braun was willing to get rich by cheating workers at his trucking company, and why he hiked taxes on Hoosiers while pushing for laws that cut his own taxes.**

Rep. Braun has shown Hoosiers who he really is. Now we want to hear from you. Do you trust Rep. Braun to do what's best for Indiana? | **Do you trust Rep. Braun?** | [**NO**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2ec3/7377f838/3d4f4b27/51f9c1dd/2678805027/VEsH/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/6PGJXV9")
---

[**YES**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2ec3/7377f838/3d4f4b27/51f9c1dd/2678805027/VEsE/ "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/6PGJXV9")
\-- IN Senate HQ

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: need you with us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Hey there -
**_The Washington Post_ has reported that Nevada is Democrats' "best pickup opportunity" - and that we have no room for error in the fight for Senate control.**
**Democrats need to go all-in in Nevada, especially with President Trump recently here fundraising for Dean Heller.** With a recent poll showing us neck and neck with GOP extremist Dean Heller, this is shaping up to be one of the most expensive and competitive races in the country.
There's no doubt about it: If you're a Democrat who cares about taking back the Senate and protecting Obamacare and the future of the Supreme Court, then we need you with us now. Democrats _cannot_ take back the Senate if we lose here in Nevada, **so we 've _got_ to hit every single one of our fundraising goals. And right now, we're falling way short of meeting our goal.**
**[Team, I'm personally asking you to chip in whatever you can right now to help us make up our shortfall so we can flip Nevada blue and take back the Senate for Democrats:](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6bf/4fbb2af3/7d73e0c9/5e8b2b4b/4278089918/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgyOC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk828-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**

clean_body: Hey there - The Washington Post has reported that Nevada is Democrats' "best pickup opportunity" - and that we have no room for error in the fight for Senate control. Democrats need to go all-in in Nevada, especially with President Trump recently here fundraising for Dean Heller. With a recent poll showing us neck and neck with GOP extremist Dean Heller, this is shaping up to be one of the most expensive and competitive races in the country. There's no doubt about it: If you're a Democrat who cares about taking back the Senate and protecting Obamacare and the future of the Supreme Court, then we need you with us now. Democrats cannot take back the Senate if we lose here in Nevada, so we 've got to hit every single one of our fundraising goals. And right now, we're falling way short of meeting our goal. "" If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" Thank you. name: MaggieHassan.com
subject: Read this email about how the Supreme Court could overturn Roe v. Wade >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0e2/2a380d31/f48f7bd/f1a817/401191014/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0e2/2a380d31/f48f7bd/f1a817/401191014/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
This is big -- President Trump is expected to announce his pick to replace Justice Anthony Kennedy on the Supreme Court tomorrow night.
This seat could tip the balance of the Court, and the finalists are all but certain to chip away at -- or even overturn -- _Roe v. Wade_ and threaten our fundamental rights.
Before Trump announces his nominee, it is critical that Senator Hassan knows where you stand. **Do you think that the Supreme Court should overturn _Roe v. Wade_?**
**[Yes](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0e2/2a380d31/f48f7bd/f1a810/401191014/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180708_Roe-SCOTUS?source=e20180708_SCOTUS-Roe1_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
[**No**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0e2/2a380d31/f48f7bd/f1a810/401191014/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180708_Roe-SCOTUS?source=e20180708_SCOTUS-Roe1_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Mitch McConnell's Republican Senate is ready to ram through whichever far-right nominee the White House puts forth.
That's why we need to make absolutely sure that every single United States Senator who stands ready to roll back our rights knows exactly what we think.
[**This is urgent -- please click here to let us know if you believe that the next Supreme Court Justice should uphold a woman's right to make her own health care choices.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0e2/2a380d31/f48f7bd/f1a810/401191014/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20180708_Roe-SCOTUS?source=e20180708_SCOTUS-Roe1_act&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")
Thank you for sharing your thoughts at this important time,
All of us on Team Maggie

[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0e2/2a380d31/f48f7bd/f1a811/401191014/VEsA/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiaGFzc2FuX2dlbmVyYWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6ImUyMDE4MDcwOF9TQ09UVVNwcmVub21fYWN0IiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjMsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAifQ==/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/hassan_general?refcode=e20180708_SCOTUSprenom_act&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500")

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc0e2/2a380d31/f48f7bd/f1a812/401191014/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH
PO Box 298
Concord, NH 03302 United States
